case_title: HECTOR PASCUAL AVALOS VS. LUIS MARENCO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALOS, HECTOR PASCUAL AS TO DEFENDANT MARENCO, LUIS ,AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVALOS, HECTOR PASCUAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARENCO, LUIS ,AN INDIVIDUAL $4,625.69 PRINCIPAL, $9.15 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,834.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
